title: taraxacum brevum
intro: Taraxacum brevum, also known as the dwarf dandelion, is a small perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Taraxacum brevum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and support liver function. Taraxacum brevum can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, with some practitioners also using it in infusions or salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
